description: Style NoteThis kurti by diva is designed to accentuate your femininity, combining traditional prints with a modern silhouette. Look stylish in this ethnic kurti and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it with denims and flats for an off-duty look.Product DetailsWhite, blue and green printed kurti with red accents, a v-neck, pin tucks along the neckline with crystal embellishments, short sleeves with pin tucks on the cuffs and split side seamsMaterial and careBlended fabricDry clean onlySize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size S
